content:
- Completed task 03 end to end: committed parser/test/task-plan/task-bookkeeping updates as `14a86e3` with the required task-finished commit message and pushed `master` to origin.
- Final verified gates for this task were `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test`; the task markdown now reads `<status>completed</status> <passes>true</passes>`, and `.ralph/task_switch.sh` already advanced Ralph bookkeeping.
- If I had to quit immediately now, there is no remaining work for task 03 in this turn; the next turn should read the new current Ralph task and continue from there.
